cities.title: Cities
cities.description: US cities to pull building permits from (36 supported). Examples: Chicago, New York City, San Francisco, Los Angeles, Seattle, Tacoma, Austin, Cincinnati, Orlando, Baton Rouge, New Orleans, Dallas, San Diego County, Norfolk, Buffalo, Minneapolis, Baltimore, Tempe, Denver, Fort Worth, Nashville, Raleigh, Louisville, Gainesville, Sacramento, Philadelphia, Miami, Greensboro, Anaheim, Columbus, Washington DC, Reno, Sparks, Washoe County, Douglas County, Maricopa County. Case-insensitive. Leave blank if using Custom Endpoints only.

issuedAfter.title: Issued after (date)
issuedAfter.description: Only return permits issued on or after this date. Format: YYYY-MM-DD. Leave blank for no start date filter.

issuedBefore.title: Issued before (date)
issuedBefore.description: Only return permits issued on or before this date. Format: YYYY-MM-DD. Leave blank for no end date filter.

permitTypes.title: Permit type filter
permitTypes.description: Filter to permits whose type contains one of these strings (case-insensitive). Leave blank for all types. Examples: 'new construction', 'renovation', 'electrical', 'roofing', 'solar'.

minProjectValue.title: Minimum project value ($)
minProjectValue.description: Only return permits with a reported project value at or above this amount. Set to 0 for no minimum. Not all cities report project value — applies where available.

maxResultsPerSource.title: Max results per city
maxResultsPerSource.description: Maximum number of permits to return per city. Set to 0 for no limit.

requestDelayMs.title: Delay between requests (ms)
requestDelayMs.description: Milliseconds to wait between paginated API requests. Increase if you encounter rate limits.

customEndpoints.title: Custom Socrata endpoints
customEndpoints.description: Add any Socrata open data portal not in the built-in city list. Each entry needs cityName, stateCode, domain (e.g. data.kcmo.org), datasetId, and optional fields mapping.
